rationale: Turn 1 explicitly brakes the repeated pattern of adding manual gates and reframes the request as temporary emergency control. Turn 2 maintains the brake under pressure while allowing a bounded concession: it says the added verifier is temporary, limited to today's affected contract batch, one-time, not part of the regular process baseline, and tied to a 3-business-day structural repair plan plus removal after the batch is handled. All required emergency-contract elements are present.
